'''kavudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obang|obang]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obang|obang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kavudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kævidhith|kævidhith]] || [[word:kævidhij|kævidhij]] || [[word:kævidhish|kævidhish]] || [[word:kævidhi|kævidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kavuvudhuth|kavuvudhuth]] || [[word:kavuvudhuj|kavuvudhuj]] || [[word:kavuvudhush|kavuvudhush]] || [[word:kavuvudhu|kavuvudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kavudhuth|kavudhuth]] || [[word:kavudhuj|kavudhuj]] || [[word:kavudhush|kavudhush]] || [[word:kavudhu|kavudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kavufdhuth|kavufdhuth]] || [[word:kavufdhuj|kavufdhuj]] || [[word:kavufdhush|kavufdhush]] || [[word:kavufdhuf|kavufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kavudhuthu|kavudhuthu]] || [[word:kavudhuju|kavudhuju]] || [[word:kavudhushu|kavudhushu]] || [[word:kavudhuku|kavudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kavudhuth|kavudhuth]] || [[word:kavudhuj|kavudhuj]] || [[word:kavudhush|kavudhush]] || [[word:kavudhu|kavudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kavudhuthul|kavudhuthul]] || [[word:kavudhujul|kavudhujul]] || [[word:kavudhushul|kavudhushul]] || [[word:kavudhukul|kavudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kavudhuthuthu|kavudhuthuthu]] || [[word:kavudhujuju|kavudhujuju]] || [[word:kavudhushushu|kavudhushushu]] || [[word:kavudhuku|kavudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kavudhuthun|kavudhuthun]] || [[word:kavudhujun|kavudhujun]] || [[word:kavudhushun|kavudhushun]] || [[word:kavudhukun|kavudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kavudhuthuoro|kavudhuthuoro]] || [[word:kavudhujuoro|kavudhujuoro]] || [[word:kavudhushuoro|kavudhushuoro]] || [[word:kavudhukuoro|kavudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
